reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio y acomodado, Muy buena atención del personal. Pero... mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
Clean and comfortable place, very good service from the staff. But... too crowded

reviews.comment:
Caro y poca variedad de comida pero es lo que hay....

(Translated by Google)
Expensive and not much variety of food, but that's what it is...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaUllc0tBEAE

reviews.comment:
Pocos empleados en el shop, ingresaban gente al hotel y había que esperar para entrar.

(Translated by Google)
There were few employees in the shop, people were entering the hotel and you had to wait to get in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LTR6MnZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El personal de 10 porque le ponen la mejor...pero el servicio del ACA de terror... no me solucionaron nada...Tuve un problema con el auto... (me quede sin bateria) y no tenian para vender... tampoco tenian cables para hacer un puente....

(Translated by Google)
The staff are fantastic because they give their all... but the ACA service is awful... they didn't solve anything for me... I had a problem with my car... (my battery died) and they didn't have any to sell... they didn't even have jumper cables....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc0l5VTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para descansar, todos los servicios, desde un desayuna hasta alojamientos, muy buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to rest, all services from breakfast to accommodations, very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURta0pQZThRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia casi 2 horas para cargar combustible! solo 2 playeros pésima atención no lleguen hasta este lugar  😡

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience! Almost 2 hours to fill up! Only 2 attendants, awful service. Don't go to this place! 😡
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNEpYTmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos esperando mas de una hora para poder cargar nafta. Una vergüenza que ante tanta demanda no contraten el personal suficiente.

(Translated by Google)
We waited over an hour to fill up our tanks. It's a disgrace that they don't hire enough staff with such high demand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNEl5MUFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Poco personal, lo que hizo que no se respetarán protocolos covid en especial lo del  distanciamiento social.

(Translated by Google)
Insufficient staff meant that COVID protocols, especially social distancing, were not respected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNEppS1RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían volver a poner en funcionamiento el expendio de gnc

(Translated by Google)
They should put the CNG station back into operation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtXzVDNFh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Otra cola interminable un 22 de diciembre (imagino fiestas, enero), me fui a otra estación

(Translated by Google)
Another endless queue on December 22nd (I imagine it's holidays, January), I went to another station
